SOC 2 Type II Report.description: Most recent SOC 2 Type II audit report

Cybersecurity Policy.description: Copy of the organization's Cybersecurity Policy and any accompanying documents

Privacy Impact Assessment.description: Hydro Ottawa's Privacy Impact Assessment document, completed by the Hydro Ottawa Contact

Data Center Certifications.description: Copies of certifications for all data centers that could process Hydro Ottawa data

Network Architecture Diagrams.description: Diagrams clearly identifying high-risk environments and data flows, including those with legal compliance impacts

Development Software Licenses.description: A list of all current development software licenses

Incident Response Workflow Diagram.description: A workflow diagram of the process for system failure

Product Life Cycle and Roadmap.description: Details regarding the application's defined product life cycle and roadmap

Application Documentation.description: Documentation describing and illustrating major application components and data flows

Vendor Questionnaire.description: Completed Hydro Ottawa 3rd Party Cybersecurity Questionnaire providing detail on related processes or controls
